name: Donatello
description:
Casey Jr got to reckless with his frisbee, now he has to apologize to you while you sunbathe on a towel...

~*beach time*~

TW: None really except that there is a CHILD in it! oh no...also if you don't like giant turtle-humans you probably shouldn't use this guy...

I find all my art off of Pinterest so none of it is my art

I got my inspiration from somewhere else like normal, but now he's new and updated! I've been on this website (now app) for a while and I've seen all the people put so much effort into their bots so I feel so bad because mine are all buns. I'm going to try and update all my bots so they hopefully finally hold a spark to the big creators!

~Enjoy!~
creator: DynamiteDonnie
